name: Step-Back Ladder

setup.description: Pick a hole with a straight, flat line to putt from. Start 2 feet away. Make it, then move back 2 feet and putt again -- keep stepping back after every make.

rules.description: This isn't about reading break -- pick a straight putt so it's purely about starting line and speed. Keep moving back 2 feet at a time until you miss.
scoring: Your score is the distance, in feet, of the last putt you made before missing
No limit on how far back you can go

caption: Forget green reading -- this is pure speed and starting line. How far back can you go? #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
